channel.title: R on Tim Thoughts
channel.description: Recent content in R on Tim Thoughts

item.title: Back to Florida
item.description: Practicing my Leaflet and data cleaning skills! This is a ethnicity breakdown of Census-tract level data of Florida using the 2014-2018 ACS datasets, focusing on CVAP (citizen voting age population) data. I’ve layered on a dot-density map of renters and internet accessibility. I’ve added 2016 and 2018 election results (using Clinton and Gillum’s percentages as a rough benchmark for Democratic Party’s “blue”) Future iterations of this map will consolidate and cleanup the missing NA’s, I got a suspicion we got some consolidated precincts to clean up.
